commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Windows chat composer slash-command catalog popup backed by gateway `commands.list`, plus presentation helpers, provider caching/plumbing, FunctionalUI flyout identity handling, and shared/tray tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new visible chat UX feature, not a bug with a failing current-main reproduction. Current main lacks the `AvailableCommands` composer plumbing and slash-menu state.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor-visible proof and maintainer UX acceptance are the remaining blockers; automation cannot provide the contributor's current-head runtime evidence.

target.title: Chat: inline /-triggered gateway command catalog menu (Mac parity)
target.body: ## Summary Brings the Windows chat composer to Mac/main parity for **gateway command-catalog discovery**: typing `/` opens an inline, floating command menu backed by the gateway `commands.list` API (using the committed protocol-foundation DTOs — no duplicated protocol models). Previously Windows chat only had hard-coded footer controls and a local/static app palette. This adds discoverable command search/autocomplete in the composer, comparable to the Mac/web Control UI command surface. ## User-visible UX - Type `/` to open a floating, opaque, elevated popup over the composer (controls don't shift). - One-line rows: a command-name–mapped Fluent icon (mirroring Mac's `COMMAND_ICON_OVERRIDES`), `/name`, inline arg template (` [level]`), description, and an `N options` badge. - Relevance-ordered; index 0 (what Enter inserts) is always the top match. - Selecting a command with **static first-arg choices** transitions the same popup into an **arg-choice picker** (Mac `slashMenuMode` parity): the header shows the arg description, the list filters as you type, and Enter/Tab/click fills `/name value`. - Commands without fixed choices insert `/name ` (trailing space when args are taken) or `/name`. - Keyboard throughout: ↑/↓ navigate, Enter/Tab select, Esc dismiss — in both command and args modes. - Catalog is lazily fetched (cached + in-flight guarded) and clearly surfaces loading / unsupported / disconnected states. On gateways without `commands.list`, the menu stays fully inert and `/text` behaves as ordinary input. ## Parity notes vs Mac At parity: `/`-trigger, floating overlay, by-name icons, one-line rows, `N options` badge, arg-choice follow-up picker, keyboard model, lazy cache + states. Intentional gaps (blocked on protocol fields our DTO doesn't carry, or Windows architecture choices): tier system / "Show N more", `instant` badge + client-side auto-run of local builtins, a footer hint bar. Filed as backlog for the protocol-foundation lane. ## Files changed - `src/OpenClaw.Shared/CommandCatalogPresentation.cs` (new) — `GatewayCommandPresentation` helpers (DisplayName, SourceLabel, RequiresArgs, BuildInsertionText, ArgTemplate, OptionCount, FirstArgChoices, BuildArgInsertionText, MatchesName) + ranked `ChatCommandCatalogView` search. - `src/OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI/Chat/OpenClawComposer.cs` — `/`-trigger state machine, floating Popup lifecycle, command + arg-choice popups, keyboard handling. - `src/OpenClaw.Tray.WinUI/Chat/OpenClawChatDataProvider.cs`, `IChatGatewayBridge.cs`, `OpenClawChatRoot.cs`, `src/OpenClaw.Chat/ChatModels.cs`, `src/OpenClawTray.FunctionalUI/FunctionalUI.cs` — catalog fetch/cache/in-flight + epoch guard plumbing and prop wiring. - Tests: `tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests/CommandCatalogPresentationTests.cs` (new), `tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests/OpenClawChatDataProviderTests.cs`. ## Validation - `./build.ps1` — ✅ all 5 projects - `OpenClaw.Shared.Tests` — ✅ 2659 passed - `OpenClaw.Tray.Tests` — ✅ 1441 passed - (`OPENCLAW_REPO_ROOT` set to the worktree per AGENTS.md.) ## Real behavior proof Built and run locally non-isolated (`run-app-local.ps1 -AllowNonMain`); `/` menu, icons, arg-choice picker, and keyboard verified interactively. ## Review Two adversarial rubber-duck reviews (GPT-5.5 high + Claude Opus 4.8 high) — no Critical findings. Substantive findings addressed: gate the menu on `CommandsSupported` (inert on unsupported gateways); swallow Enter while loading so raw `/text` can't race the fetch; relevance order so Enter inserts the top match; exit args mode on whitespace; move the catalog fetch to a deps-keyed `UseEffect` (no render-time churn / unbounded retries). Deferred + documented: a pre-existing `UiRenderer` per-component unmount-cleanup limitation (affects all components; not introduced here), plus two cosmetic Lows. 🤖 Generated with [Copilot CLI](https://github.com/github/copilot-cli)
